message.content:
PreOne  
Empowering Preschools.  
Enriching Childhoods.  

AI GROWTH ENGINE ✨  
From Every Observation to Lifelong Impact  

Observe • Analyze • Understand • Guide • Grow  


### 1 TEACHER OBSERVATION  
Capture Moments, Add Insights  
← Add Observation  
- Aarav Sharma  
  3.6 Yrs • Nursery A  
- Activity  
  🎨 Drawing & Coloring  
- Observation  
  Aarav showed great interest in coloring the picture. He chose bright colors and was very focused. He shared his crayons with a friend.  
- Mood  
  😊 Happy  
- Skills Observed  
  Creativity • Focus • Sharing  
- Media  
  [Photos] [Videos] [Notes] [Voice]  
- Save Observation  


### 2 AI PROCESSING LAYER  
Understand • Analyze • Detect  
PreOne AI Brain  
- Natural Language Processing  
  Understand teacher notes  
- Image Recognition  
  Analyze child activities  
- Emotion Detection  
  Detect mood & engagement  
- Pattern Recognition  
  Identify growth patterns  
- Behavioral Analysis  
  Evaluate development areas  
Multi-Model AI Engine  


### 3 GROWTH ENGINE  
Calculate • Score • Track  
AI Growth Score  
82  
Great Progress! 🎉  
- Creativity  
  92%  
- Communication  
  76%  
- Social Skills  
  84%  
- Confidence  
  76%  
- Cognitive Skills  
  80%  
- Focus & Attention  
  88%  
Scores updated in real-time  


### 4 PARENT INSIGHTS  
Clear • Simple • Actionable  
Aarav’s AI Summary  
Aarav is showing strong creative abilities and enjoys hands-on activities. He is building good focus and sharing skills.  

Strengths  
- Very creative and imaginative  
- Good focus on preferred tasks  
- Shares and cooperates well  

Areas to Support  
- Group communication  
- Expressing in group activities  
- Building confidence to speak  
Easy to understand for parents  


### 5 PERSONALIZED RECOMMENDATIONS  
AI Suggested Next Steps  
For School  
- Group Storytelling Activity  
  Encourage Aarav to speak in small group.  
- Show & Tell Session  
  Help Aarav build confidence by sharing his work.  
- Team Play Activity  
  Improve social interaction through fun group games.  

For Parents (At Home)  
- Daily Talk Time  
  Spend 10 mins talking about his day.  
- Creative Time  
  Encourage drawing, DIY and storytelling.  
- Play Dates  
  Arrange playtime with peers to build confidence.  
Personalized for every child  


### 6 CHILDHOOD PASSPORT™ UPDATE  
Store • Track • Treasure  
Childhood Passport™  
Aarav Sharma  
3.6 Yrs • Nursery A  

Milestone Unlocked  
Creative Explorer  
Aarav shows creativity and imagination in art activities.  

Growth Snapshot  
- Overall Score  
  82 ↑ 6  
- Date  
  24 May 2024  
- View Full Passport  
Memories. Milestones. Forever.  


### GROWTH TREND OVER TIME  
Track every step of your child’s beautiful journey.

- Creativity  
- Communication  
[Line graph: Dec → Jan → Feb → Mar → Apr → May]  


### DEVELOPMENT DOMAINS  
Creativity • Focus • Cognitive Skills • Confidence • Social Skills • Communication  
[Hexagon chart with current/last month/age average]

AI benchmarked with 1000+ children data  


### MILESTONES ACHIEVED

### HOW AI HELPS EVERYONE  
- For Teachers  
  Saves time, reduces paperwork, and gives smart insights.  
- For Parents  
  Understands child better, tracking real growth.  
- For Admin  
  Data-driven decisions, better outcomes.  
- For Children  
  Personalized care for holistic development.  


Every Observation Matters.  
Every Child Grows.  
Observe every moment → AI analyzes instantly → Understand deeply → Guide better → Grow confidently → Remember forever  

PreOne AI is not just technology,  
it’s a partner in your child’s beautiful journey. ✨
